title: Snap Inc. Announces First Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces First Quarter 2022 Financial Results

Key Financial Results

Revenue for Q1 2022 was $1.06 billion versus $1.07 billion expected, representing a miss on Wall Street estimates. Daily active users increased 18% year-over-year to 332 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $(43) million in Q1 2022, compared to $43 million in the prior year.

Profitability Challenges

Net loss was $(267) million in Q1 2022, compared to $(213) million in the prior year. The company reported a loss of 2 cents per share, compared to expected earnings of 1 cent.

Market Headwinds

The company cited macroeconomic challenges, including inflation and supply chain disruptions, as headwinds to advertising demand. Apple's iOS privacy changes continued to impact the company's ability to measure and optimize advertising campaigns.

Forward Guidance

Management provided cautious guidance for Q2 2022, projecting revenue growth of 20-25% year-over-year, though below historical rates. The company acknowledged ongoing uncertainties related to the operating environment.
